build.buildCommand: if [ -d apps/backend ]; then cd apps/backend; fi; python -m ensurepip --upgrade; python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel; python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d apps/backend ]; then cd apps/backend; fi; uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
